title: Register a new account and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a guest user can create an account and is taken to the dashboard after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the username field with a new account name
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify saved designs are displayed

title: Sign out from the dashboard
description: This verifies a signed-in user can log out from the dashboard and return to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Open the user menu
Sign out
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify the user is no longer signed in

title: Sign in with email and password and land on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a registered member can sign in with email and password and access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify saved designs are displayed

title: Save editor changes and keep them after returning
description: This verifies a user can make an edit, save it, and later see the saved design still contains the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add text to the canvas
Trigger a save of the design
Return to the design after leaving the editor
Verify the saved change is still present
Verify the design remains available in the account

title: Open editor from an existing design
description: This verifies a signed-in user can reach an existing design in the editor from the dashboard and begin editing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Verify the design editor is displayed
Verify the active garment view is displayed

title: Choose a product type and open a new editor session
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can select a garment type and create a new design opened in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the control to start a new design
Choose an oversize t-shirt or hoodie product
Verify the editor opens
Verify a new design canvas is displayed

title: Create a new design from product selection
description: This verifies a signed-in user can choose a supported product and arrive in the editor with a new design started.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the product selection page
Select an oversize t-shirt or hoodie product
Start a new design
Verify the design editor is displayed
Verify a new blank design is displayed

title: Open an existing design from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open a saved design from the dashboard and continue editing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a saved design card
Verify the editor opens
Verify the design canvas is displayed

title: Start a new design from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can begin a new design from the dashboard and reach product selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the control to start a new design
Verify the product selection page is displayed
Verify available product types are displayed

title: Rename, duplicate, and delete a design from the designs list
description: This verifies a user can manage saved designs from the designs page and see the list update after each action.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the designs list page
Rename an existing design
Duplicate the renamed design
Delete one of the designs
Verify the designs list reflects the updates
Verify the deleted design is no longer displayed

title: Delete a design from the designs list
description: This verifies that an account owner can delete a saved design and see it removed from the designs list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the full designs list
Delete a saved design
Verify the deleted design is removed from the list
Verify the designs list still displays remaining items

title: Add text to the active design view
description: This verifies that a designer can add a text object to the active canvas view in the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add a text object to the canvas
Verify the text object is displayed on the canvas

title: Switch garment views and preserve separate canvas content
description: This verifies each garment view keeps its own independent canvas state when a user adds content and switches between views.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Switch to a different garment view
Add text to the current view
Switch back to the original garment view
Verify the original view remains unchanged
Verify the added content remains on the other view

title: Rename a design in the designs list
description: This verifies that an account owner can rename a saved design and see the updated title in the designs list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the full designs list
Rename a saved design
Verify the updated design title is displayed
Verify the renamed design remains in the list

title: Search saved designs from the dashboard
description: This verifies a signed-in user can search their saved designs and see matching results in the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Enter a search term for a saved design
Verify matching designs are displayed
Verify non-matching designs are hidden

title: Switch garment views while editing a design
description: This verifies that a designer can switch between garment views in the editor and each view remains available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Switch to another garment view
Switch to a different garment view again
Verify multiple garment views are available
Verify the active canvas updates for the selected view

title: Edit an object on the canvas
description: This verifies a signed-in user can select a canvas object and update its properties with the change reflected on the design.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add text to the canvas
Select the newly added object
Edit one of the object properties
Verify the object update is visible on the canvas

title: Reorder and remove layers in the editor
description: This verifies that a designer can manage canvas layers by changing their order and deleting an object.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add two canvas objects
Move one object behind the other
Delete one canvas object
Verify only one object remains on the canvas

title: Reorder or delete a layer
description: This verifies a user can change the layer stack or remove an object and see the canvas composition update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add two text objects to the canvas
Reorder the selected layer or delete one object
Verify the canvas composition reflects the layer change
Verify the removed object is no longer visible

title: Update profile username and avatar
description: This verifies a signed-in user can change profile details and see the updated profile information persist in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Change the username
Upload a new avatar image
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated username is displayed
Verify the updated avatar is displayed

title: Duplicate a design in the designs list
description: This verifies that an account owner can duplicate a saved design and see the copy appear in the designs list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the full designs list
Duplicate a saved design
Verify a duplicated design appears in the list
Verify both the original and duplicate are available

title: Duplicate an object with the keyboard shortcut
description: This verifies a user can duplicate a selected canvas object with the keyboard and see a second copy appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Add text to the canvas
Select the text object
Press the duplicate keyboard shortcut
Verify a duplicate object is visible on the canvas

title: Update profile details and see them across the app
description: This verifies that an account owner can update profile information and the change persists across other signed-in pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Update the username or avatar
Save the profile changes
Navigate to the dashboard
Verify the updated profile information is visible
Verify the change is reflected in another signed-in page

title: Import a project file into the editor
description: This verifies a user can import a supported project file and see the design load into the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Open the project import control
Import a supported project file
Verify the imported project is loaded in the editor
Verify the canvas content from the project is visible

title: Export the current design from the editor
description: This verifies a user can export the active design from the editor and complete a file export action.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing design from the dashboard
Open the export control in the editor
Export the active view or the full project
Verify an export action completes successfully
Verify the editor remains open after export

title: View profile design count
description: This verifies the profile page shows the user's current design count alongside profile details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Verify the profile details are displayed
Verify the design count is displayed
